properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When you start for the land of heavenly rest, Keep close to Jesus all the way; For He is the guide, and He knows the way best, Keep close to Jesus all the way.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Keep close to Jesus, keep close to Jesus, Keep close to Jesus all the way; By day or by night never turn from the right, Keep close to Jesus all the way.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Never mind the storms of trials as you go, Keep close to Jesus all the way; 'Tis a comfort and joy His favor to know, Keep close to Jesus all the way.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: To be safe from the darts of the evil one, Keep close to Jesus all the way; Take the shield of faith till the victory is won, Keep close to Jesus all the way.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We shall reach our home in Heaven by and by, Keep close to Jesus all the way; Where to those we love we'll never say goodbye, Keep close to Jesus all the way.
